title: Learning and skills and library services for adult prisons in Wales: PSI 2/2015
body: "This PSI is primarily for Governors and their staff. It details the minimum mandatory requirements which are needed to deliver Learning & Skills and Library services in adult prisons in Wales.  It sets out both the legal duties and policy requirements placed upon Governors for the provision of education services in their prison.  It does not apply to the Youth Custody estate, Immigration Removal Centres or prisons in England (for which there is a separate Policy Framework). "
